summary: Audience DAT capture using high‑grade Neumann mics suggests good sound quality, but no details on the musical performance are provided.
review: The lone review supplies technical recording information – a left‑hand position with Neumann KM140 microphones feeding an Aerco preamp into a Casio DA‑R100 DAT deck – indicating a fairly clear audience source. No comments are made about the band's playing, setlist, or standout moments, so the show quality cannot be assessed from this input.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4‑star) focused on recording gear; suggests decent audio but offers no insight into performance, leading to an average combined rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded with Neumann KM140 microphones, Aerco power supply/preamp, and a Casio DA‑R100 DAT deck – indicative of a clear, well‑captured audience source.
